description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian, with a human-like lower body visible beneath a large, angular, and fragmented overhanging structure. The legs are clad in fitted pants and sturdy, high-ankle boots, suggesting a practical or possibly tactical style. The upper body and head are almost entirely obscured by the overhanging geometric forms, which appear to be an artifact or error in the model, rather than clothing or accessories. The visible portions of the figure are proportionate and anatomically correct, with a realistic stance and detailed boot features. The boots have defined soles and straps, and the pants show some creasing and fit contours. The overall appearance is that of a standing adult, but the upper body is not visible due to the obstructing geometry.
description: A standing adult pedestrian with detailed boots and fitted pants, mostly obscured above the waist by large, angular overhanging geometry.
description_view_0: Lower body of a standing adult visible beneath sharp, angular overhangs; boots and pants are clear.
description_view_1: Partial view of the legs and boots, with the overhanging structure dominating the upper part of the image.
description_view_2: Back view of the legs and boots, with the upper body completely hidden by a solid black overhang.
description_view_3: Side view of the legs and boots, showing the stance and some boot details, with the overhang above.
